Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. Create a clean heart in me, O God; give back to me the joy of your salvation.

Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. I am the resurrection and the life, says the Lord; whoever believes in me will not die for ever.

Refrain Text: Lord, remember us, for the love you bear your people.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. God loved the world so much, he gave us his only Son, that all who believe in him might have eternal life.

Refrain Text: The Lord is near to broken hearts.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. No one lives on bread alone, but on every word that comes from the mouth of God.

Refrain Text: Lord, my God, I take shelter in you.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. Blessed are they who have kept the word with a generous heart and yield a harvest through perseverance.

Refrain Text: Lord, when your glory appears, my joy will be full.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. I am the resurrection and the life, says the Lord: whoever believes in me will not die for ever.

Refrain Text: Though I walk in the valley of darkness,
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. I do not wish the sinner to die, says the Lord, but to turn to me and live.

Refrain Text: O Lord, hear my prayer, and let my cry come to you.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. The seed is the word of God, Christ is the sower; all who come to him will live for ever.

Refrain Text: The Lord remembers his covenant forever.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. If today you hear God’s voice, harden not your hearts.

Refrain Text: In my distress I called upon the Lord, and he heard my voice.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. Your words, Lord, are spirit and life; you have the words of everlasting life. FRIDAY 481

Refrain Text: The Lord is my light and my salvation.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. Hail to you, our king; you alone showed mercy for our sins.

Refrain Text: I will sing of your salvation.
Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. Hail to you, our king, obedient to the Father; you went to your crucifixion like a gentle lamb. TUESDAY 489

Acclamation Text: If the acclamation is not sung, it is omitted. Hail to you, our king; you alone showed mercy for our sins. or: Hail to you, our king, obedient to the Father; you went to your crucifixion like a gentle lamb.

Refrain Text: Keep me safe, O God; you are my hope.
Acclamation Text: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad.

Refrain Text: The earth is full of the goodness of the Lord.
Acclamation Text: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad. TUESDAY 499

Refrain Text: Let all who seek the Lord rejoice.
Acclamation Text: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad.

Refrain Text: O Lord, our God, how wonderful your name in all the earth!
Acclamation Text: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad.

Refrain Text: The stone rejected by the builders has become the cornerstone.
Acclamation Text: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad.

Refrain Text: I praise you, Lord, for you have answered me.
Acclamation Text: This is the day that the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad. SATURDAY 511

Refrain Text: Happy are all who put their trust in the Lord.
Acclamation Text: If then you have been raised with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is seated at the right hand of God.

Acclamation Text: The Son of Man must be lifted up, so that all who believe in him may have eternal life.

Refrain Text: The Lord hears the cry of the poor.
Acclamation Text: God loved the world so much, he gave us his only Son, that all who believe in him might have eternal life. 518 SECOND WEEK OF EASTER

Refrain Text: The Lord hears the cry of the poor.
Acclamation Text: You believe in me, Thomas, because you have seen me; happy those who have not seen me, but still believe! 520 SECOND WEEK OF EASTER

Refrain Text: One thing I seek: to dwell in the house of the Lord.
Acclamation Text: No one lives on bread alone, but on every word that comes from the mouth of God.

Refrain Text: Lord, let you mercy be on us, as we place our trust in you.
Acclamation Text: Christ is risen, the Lord of all creation; he has shown pity on all people.

Refrain Text: Happy are they who follow the law of the Lord!
Acclamation Text: No one lives on bread alone, but on every word that comes from the mouth of God.

Refrain Text: Into your hands, O Lord, I entrust my spirit.
Acclamation Text: I am the bread of life, says the Lord; whoever comes to me will never be hungry.

Refrain Text: Let all the earth cry out to God with joy.
Acclamation Text: All who believe in the Son have eternal life, and I will raise them up on the last day, says the Lord.

Refrain Text: Let all the earth cry out to God with joy.
Acclamation Text: I am the living bread from heaven, says the Lord; whoever eats this bread will live for ever.

Refrain Text: Go out to all the world and tell the good news.
Acclamation Text: All who eat my flesh and drink my blood live in me, and I in them, says the Lord. FRIDAY 537

Refrain Text: What return can I make to the Lord for all that he gives to me?
Acclamation Text: Your words, Lord, are spirit and life; you have the words of everlasting life.

Refrain Text: My soul is thirsting for the living God.
Acclamation Text: I am the good shepherd, says the Lord; I know my sheep, and mine know me. MONDAY 543 YEARS B AND C When the gospel of John 10.1-10 is read on the Fourth Sunday of Easter, Year A, the alternate gospel,

Refrain Text: All you nations, praise the Lord.
Acclamation Text: My sheep listen to me, says the Lord; I know them, and they follow me.

Refrain Text: O God, let all the nations praise you!
Acclamation Text: I am the light of the world, says the Lord; whoever follows me will have the light of life.

Refrain Text: For ever I will sing the goodness of the Lord.
Acclamation Text: Jesus Christ, you are the faithful witness, firstborn from the dead; you have loved us and washed away our sins in your blood. THURSDAY 551

Refrain Text: You are my Son; this day I have begotten you.
Acclamation Text: I am the way, the truth, and the life, says the Lord; no one comes to the Father, except through me. FRIDAY 553

Refrain Text: All the ends of the earth have seen the saving power of God.
Acclamation Text: If you stay in my word, you will indeed be my disciples, and you will know the truth, says the Lord.

Refrain Text: Not to us, O Lord, but to your name give the glory.
Acclamation Text: The Holy Spirit will teach you all things and remind you of all I have said to you. 558 FIFTH WEEK OF EASTER

Refrain Text: Your friends tell the glory of your kingship, Lord.
Acclamation Text: Christ had to suffer and to rise from the dead, and so enter into his glory.

Refrain Text: Let us go rejoicing to the house of the Lord.
Acclamation Text: Live in me and let me live in you, says the Lord; my branches bear much fruit.

Refrain Text: Proclaim God’s marvellous deeds to all the nations.
Acclamation Text: My sheep listen to my voice, says the Lord; I know them, and they follow me. THURSDAY 565

Refrain Text: I will praise you among the nations, O Lord.
Acclamation Text: I call you my friends, says the Lord, for I have made known to you all that the Father has told me. FRIDAY 567

Refrain Text: Let all the earth cry out to God with joy.
Acclamation Text: If then you have been raised with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is seated at the right hand of God. SATURDAY 569

Acclamation Text: The Lord says: I will send you the Spirit of truth, who will lead you to the whole truth.

Refrain Text: Heaven and earth are full of your glory.
Acclamation Text: The Father will send you the Holy Spirit, says the Lord, to be with you for ever. 576 SIXTH WEEK OF EASTER

Refrain Text: The Lord has revealed to the nations his saving power.
Acclamation Text: The Lord says: I will not leave you orphans. I will come back to you, and your hearts will rejoice. 578 SIXTH WEEK OF EASTER

Acclamation Text: Christ had to suffer and to rise from the dead, and so enter into his glory.

Acclamation Text: If then you have been raised with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is seated at the right hand of God.

Refrain Text: Sing to God, O kingdoms of the earth.
Acclamation Text: The Father will send you the Holy Spirit, says the Lord, to be with you for ever.

Refrain Text: Sing to God, O kingdoms of the earth.
Acclamation Text: Your word, O Lord, is truth; make us holy in the truth.

Refrain Text: Keep me safe, O God; you are my hope.
Acclamation Text: May all be one as you, Father, are in me, and I in you; let the world believe that you sent me, says the Lord. 592 SEVENTH WEEK OF EASTER

Acclamation Text: The Holy Spirit will teach you all things and remind you of all I have said to you.

Acclamation Text: The Lord says: I will send you the Spirit of truth, who will lead you to the whole truth. SATURDAY 597

Acclamation Text: Come follow me, says the Lord, and I will make you fishers of my people.

Refrain Text: Into your hands, O Lord, I entrust my spirit.
Acclamation Text: Blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord: the Lord shines upon us.

Refrain Text: Let the just rejoice in the Lord.
Acclamation Text: We praise you, O God, we acclaim you as Lord; the glorious company of apostles praise you.

Refrain Text: Our soul has escaped like a bird from the hunter’s net.
Acclamation Text: We praise you, O God, we acclaim you as Lord; the white-robed army of martyrs praise you.

Refrain Text: In you, Lord, I have found my peace.
Acclamation Text: I give you a new commandment: love one another as I have loved you.

Refrain Text: Happy are those who delight in the Lord’s commands.
Acclamation Text: You did not choose me, but I chose you; and I appointed you to go and bear fruit that will last.

Refrain Text: Go out to all the world and tell the good news.
Acclamation Text: I have chosen you from the world, says the Lord, to go and bear fruit that will last. JANUARY 631
